case_title: MARVIN TORRES PADILLA VS. FLAVIO BATISTA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORRES PADILLA, MARVIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BATISTA, FLAVIO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TORRES PADILLA, MARVIN AS TO DEFENDANT BATISTA, FLAVIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TORRES PADILLA, MARVIN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-29-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER FANNY SUAREZ PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-29-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BATISTA, FLAVIO
